---
title: DaSL Data Science Personas Tag Pages
---

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(fs)
library(htmltools)
library(rmarkdown)

tags_ <- here("_personas/") |> 
  dir_ls() |> 
  map(~ yaml_front_matter(.x)$tags) |> 
  unlist() |> 
  unique() |> 
  sort()

tag_pages <- tags_ |> 
  tolower() |> 
  (\(x) gsub("\\s", "-", x))() |> 
  paste0(".html")

for (i in seq_along(tags_)) {
  tags$a(href = tag_pages[i], tags_[[i]]) |> 
    tags$h2() |> 
    print()
}
```
